allow: Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof p\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(p\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''error:'', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(''PDFParse type:'', typeof p.PDFParse\); console.log\(''PDFParse:'', p.PDFParse.toString\(\).substring\(0,200\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\(''pdf-parse/package.json''\); console.log\(''version:'', pkg.version\); console.log\(''main:'', pkg.main\)")
